ddls:
CREATE TABLE "generations" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation record */,
  "generation_number" INTEGER /* Number of the generation being recorded */,
  "pop_size" INTEGER /* Population size for this generation */,
  "worst" REAL /* Worst score in this generation */,
  "best" REAL /* Best score in this generation */,
  "median" REAL /* Median score in this generation */,
  "avg" REAL /* Average score across the population */,
  "std" REAL /* Standard deviation of scores in this generation */,
  "diversity" REAL /* Diversity score of the population */,
  "improvement" REAL /* Improvement metric from the previous generation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the generation started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the generation ended */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Duration of the generation execution */,
  "convergence" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the generation has converged */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm used for this generation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "selections" (
  "selection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each selection method */,
  "selection_method" TEXT /* Name of the selection method (e.g., Tournament, Roulette) */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of selection for this method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the selection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("selection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the genetic algorithm */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameter settings for the algorithm in JSON format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was last updated */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the algorithm */,
  "last_updated_by_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "populations" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the generation this population belongs to */,
  "individuals" TEXT /* List of individuals in the population, stored in JSON format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the population was created */,
  "diversity_score" REAL /* Diversity score of the population */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm used for this population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_populations_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the configuration */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm being used */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Population size for the algorithm run */,
  "num_generations" INTEGER /* Number of generations to run the algorithm for */,
  "selection_id" INTEGER /* Selection method used in this configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the configuration */,
  "last_updated_by_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_selection_id FOREIGN KEY ("selection_id") REFERENCES selections ("selection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result record */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration used for this run */,
  "final_best" REAL /* Final best score achieved in the run */,
  "final_median" REAL /* Final median score of the run */,
  "final_avg" REAL /* Final average score of the run */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm run started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm run ended */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Duration of the algorithm run */,
  "convergence" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the algorithm run has converged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the generation this metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric being recorded */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm used for this metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user related to the event */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm related to the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm related to the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm this parameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was last updated */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the parameter */,
  "last_updated_by_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was provided */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm related to the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)
